chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No. D–2537 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For orders on office objection No.1. 2. For hearing of CMA No.11861/2025. 3. for hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 12.06.2025 Mr. Wishra Mittar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Shamshad Ahmed, Advocate for SBR. Mr. Ali Safdar Deepar, AAG Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Mr. Shamshad Ahmed Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of Sindh Revenue Board. Learned counsel for the petitioner seeks the same relief as was given in order dated 11.10.2023 in C.P. No.D-4285 of 2023. Learned counsel for Sindh Revenue Board and learned AAG Sindh both have no objection to such proposal. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of alongwith listed application in terms of order dated 11.10.2023 which is reproduced below for ease of reference: “This Petition was filed by impugning the recovery proceeding initiated by the Respondent Department during the pendency of the Appeal before Commissioner (Appeals), Sindh Revenue Board, Karachi. Learned Counsel for the Petitioner submits that similar type of cases have already been disposed of with directions to the Commissioner Appeals to the decide the pending Appeal of the Petitioner to which the Counsel for the Respondents concede. Accordingly, this Petition is disposed of by directing the Commissioner (Appeals), Sindh Revenue Board, Karachi to decide the pending Appeal preferably within 60 days from passing of this order whereas during such period the Respondent / Department shall not take any coercive action against the Petitioner. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms with listed application(s).” HEAD OF CONST.

Accordingly, this Petition is disposed of by directing the Commissioner (Appeals), Sindh Revenue Board, Karachi to decide the pending Appeal preferably within 60 days from passing of this order whereas during such period the Respondent / Department shall not take any coercive action against the Petitioner. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms with listed application(s).” HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Asif
